title: ヲタク最高すぎるんだが？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back from a day out, Agnes Digital
and I take a stroll around a park.

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text: Um... Excuse me... Digital...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! I know you! I see you all the time at
Umamusume fan events! Did you come to make
plans for the next one?

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
Um... Actually, the truth is... I've been thinking
of... giving up on this life.
choice_data_list:
Don't be rash! You've got so much ahead of
you!

Don't be rash! You've got so much ahead of
you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's not what she means. She's talking about the simp life! Still... why would you ever want to?

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
There's this school I want to get into, but it's
really competitive. So... I think I have to quit
simping in order to focus on my studies.

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
So... I'd like to entrust all the merch I've acquired
to you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp. To me?

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
Well... I just know that you'll take good care of it
all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...I see. Understood. I'll take the merch.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: However! And I mean this! I'll take the merch off your hands, but it'll only be for a while.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's right! You're not quitting the life! You're
taking time off, is all. Once your studies calm
down, I'll be awaiting your proud return!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
B-but... I'm not confident I'll ever be able to come
back.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: You will. I believe in you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember the time during that cold snap
we both froze our butts off in the standby line for
that merch store?

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
The line for merch is over here. Estimated waiting
time is about one hour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooosh, whooooosh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oooh... I should've dressed warmer before
coming... Brrr!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Um... I have a heat pad with me, so... we can
take turns, if you'd like!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure?! It's my own fault I didn't come here
prepared...

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
But, we're in this together, aren't we?! We both
came here to support our oshis. We'll make it
inside together, come hell or high water!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whooagh! I'm so grateful and happy! Let's show
Mother Nature she won't get the best of us!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
...That's right. Supporting my oshi gave me
purpose... which is why...

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. It might take me a long, long time,
but... I'll definitely be back! In all my simp glory!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Take your time. Remember, us simps are built
strong! We can wait on our knees for hours even
for mere scraps of new deets about our oshis!
choice_data_list: Is this another side to loving Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No kidding! Sometimes we're competing with
each other for event tickets, and other times
we're helping each other support our oshis!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
And sometimes we trade merch when we end up
with duplicates... Interacting with other fans is
one of the many joys to being part of a fandom!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
Oh man... I miss it already! Waiting this out is
going to be like living life on super hard mode!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In that case, whenever you need a break from
studying, why not dip your toes back in?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Just hold yourself back a bit and you'll be fine.
What matters most is showing your fave your
love.

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
W-well, I... I'm going to dedicate myself to my
studies now, but I'll spare some time to keep
supporting my oshis!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And I'll keep an eye on you when you do to make
sure it doesn't interfere with your studies.
...Welcome back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two exchange a firm handshake, marking this
astonishingly quick end to the girl's break from
fandom!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh... it wasn't that big a deal. I was just lending a
hand to a comrade. For our precious Umas, there
is still love to offer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What we give doesn't compare to all the delight
they provide for us!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
Digital! I knew you were the perfect person to
hold onto my collection.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...By the way, you wouldn't happen to have a
copy of that ultra rare, raffle-only concert DVD
in here, would you?

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
Aha, you have a refined taste! Of course it's in
there. Nyehehe, enjoy it to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You've just made my day! I promise I'll watch it
twice every day—once for both of us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital displays her firm resolve by vowing
to revere the Umamusume merch for herself and
her fellow fan.
